description: Sign a blockchain transaction with a Tier 1 (custodial) wallet. Requires an active consent grant from the authenticated user to the requesting dApp origin. Payload shape is chain-specific.

dappOrigin.description: Falls back to X-dApp-Origin header if omitted.

tx.description: Ethereum only: a TransactionRequest object (to, value, data, nonce, gasLimit, chainId, maxFeePerGas, ...). chainId is required so we never sign replay-vulnerable transactions.

messageBase64.description: Solana only: base64-encoded bytes of Transaction.compileMessage().serialize(). Max 128KB.

signature.description: Solana: base58-encoded Ed25519 signature over messageBase64.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or oversize payload.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana.

errors.name: WalletNotFound
errors.description: No such wallet for this DID.

errors.name: WalletInactive
errors.description: Wallet has been exported or superseded.

errors.name: ConsentRequired
errors.description: No active consent grants this dApp permission.

errors.name: SigningFailed
errors.description: Custodial key material is missing or signing threw.
